ddls:
CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., TRAIN) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Battery Power, RAM) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (foreign key reference to user_roles) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device to which the metric belongs */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Benchmark Score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "device1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first device in the comparison */,
  "device2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second device in the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id")
)
